name: 沈妙
bio: 沈妙，以魅力与智慧征服战场的女性。她的伤害输出极为出色，以枪械与机甲为武器，在战场上游刃有余。
bio_en: Feria Shen, a charming young woman who conquers the battlefield with charm and wits. Her damage output is one of her best qualities.
story: 沈妙，以魅力与智慧著称的战士。她驾驶青铜机甲，以枪械为武器，在战场上展现出令人叹为观止的战斗力。她的存在本身就是一种威慑。

skills.skill_description: 向后跳跃同时向前射击，造成爆炸伤害。可移动准星调整跳跃方向。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Leap back while firing outwards, causing a blast. Move the crosshair to adjust the direction of the leap. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 向前冲刺同时向四面八方射击。可移动准星调整冲刺方向。冷却20秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Move forward while launching shots in every direction. Adjust the direction by moving the crosshair. Cooldown: 20s.

skills.skill_description: 召唤青铜机甲并驾驶。可使用推进器向前移动，使用蜂群进行射击并积累机甲能量。
skills.skill_description_en: Call forth and pilot the Bronze Mech. Use thrust to move forward, and Swarm to shoot and build up the Mech's energy.

skills.skill_description: 驾驶机甲，机甲能量和生命值提升。按F可消耗机甲生命值，为自身恢复护甲并提升友军伤害减免。
skills.skill_description_en: Pilot the mech with increased energy and HP. Press F to exhaust the Mech's HP, restoring Armor and increasing allies' damage reduction.
